response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong polyglot experience, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware focus. C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015. Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack work, not cloud compute platforms or C++ systems engineering. No demonstrated technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded
Some distributed/low-latency experience at Dunnhumby handling high request volume
Community teaching/mentoring via workshops, dojos, and courses
concerns: Far below 8 years of C++ experience (only ~6 months at NI)
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infra background
Polyglot full-stack and some distributed systems exposure
